title: HTML and XML content parsers
description:
Implements decision record (dev/active/f6a704d0-validation-engine.md) section 6.2.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] HTML and XML parsers implement the content-parser trait behind OPTIONAL cargo features (not in the default build).
- [hard] A content rule works identically across md, html, and xml inputs in tests, proving the projection is genuinely format-agnostic.
